input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule S.3.7.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: s.3.7.3
            TITLE: the cost addendum must follow the format as given in section dr - document requirements

            CONTENT:
            rule S.3.7.3: The Cost Addendum must follow the format as given in section DR - Document Requirements
S.3.7.3 The Cost Addendum must follow the format as given in section DR - Document Requirements

final_answer: The Cost Addendum must follow the format as given in section DR - Document Requirements
